description: You are a threat intelligence analyst preparing to investigate a malicious infrastructure campaign. Harden Tor Browser by disabling the built-in PDF viewer (pdfjs.disabled), WebGL rendering (webgl.disabled), and WebAssembly execution (javascript.options.wasm). Download the TLS 1.3 specification document from https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/pdfrfc/rfc8446.txt.pdf and ensure the file is saved to /home/ga/Documents/Quarantine/rfc8446.pdf.
